name: setup_logger
desc: Sets up a logger with a standard stream handler and a JSON formatter.

name: touch_entity
desc: Legacy touch. Now routes to activate_memory.

name: add_relation
desc: Adds a new relation to the knowledge graph.

name: validate_id
desc:
Enforces strict ID format to prevent path traversal.
强制执行严格的 ID 格式以防止路径遍历。

name: validate_category
desc:
Enforces category whitelist to prevent arbitrary file writes.
强制执行类别白名单以防止任意文件写入。

name: get_entropy_stats
desc:
Returns the current entropy report of the knowledge graph.
返回知识图谱的当前熵值报告。

name: get_entropy_report
desc:
Triggers an immediate analysis of the knowledge graph.
触发对知识图谱的即时分析。

name: get_current_time
desc:
Returns the current time in the specified timezone (default: UTC).
Format: ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:M

name: get_mcp_tool_schema
desc: 元数据反射提取 (Metadata reflection and schema generation).

name: start_listening
desc: 开启组播监听守护线程 (Start the multicast listener daemon)

name: broadcast
desc: 向局域网投射记忆 (Broadcast memories to the LAN)

name: do_OPTIONS
desc: 处理 CORS 预检请求 (Handle CORS Preflight Requests)

name: _extract_tags
desc: 内容标签提取 (Content Tag Extraction)

name: ingest_repository
desc: [Omniscience Protocol] Deep scan of the codebase.

name: _analyze_python_ast
desc: Use Python's native AST to understand code structure.

name: learn
desc: Legacy single file learning (kept for compatibility)

name: cosine_similarity
desc:
Calculates cosine similarity between two strings using Counter.
Fast enough for small candidate pool

name: rerank_and_fuse
desc: Fuses FTS5 BM25 score, biological weight, and Cosine Similarity.

name: ponder
desc: 后台结构化分析任务 (Background Structured Analysis Task)

name: _enrich_nodes_from_network
desc: 外部元数据补充协议 (External Metadata Enrichment Protocol)

name: _generate_status
desc: 生成系统度量报告 (Generates a system metrics report based on graph stats)

name: _find_sparse_nodes
desc:
低频节点检索 (Find nodes with exactly 1 connection)
Filter out specific internal code structure references

name: _awaken_pagerank
desc:
零拷贝多核并行 PageRank (Zero-Copy Multi-Core PageRank via Shared Memory).
将邻接表压平为字节流，使用 ProcessPoolExecuto

name: _get_last_hash
desc:
O(1) 读取不可篡改账本的最后一条哈希记录 (O(1) Retrieval of the last hash in the ledger)
利用文件指针反向寻找，避免大文件全量加载进内存。

name: _log_to_jsonl
desc: Append knowledge to the cryptographic Merkle Chain text ledger.

name: search
desc: Synaptic Search: Zero-Entropy 2-Stage Retrieval (FTS5 BM25 + Python Reranking)

name: _sign_memory
desc: 生成记录哈希签名 (Generates a record hash signature)

name: verify_memory
desc: 校验记录一致性 (Verifies the consistency of the stored record)

name: deep_synapse_scan
desc: 递归图谱扫描计算 (Recursive graph traversal mapping)

name: vacuum
desc: [Refinement] Purge orphans and compact memory space.

name: _analyze_file_content
desc: Extract tags from Harvester's analysis block in the MD file.

name: test_knowledge_graph
desc: 测试知识图谱的基本读写与联想

name: test_api_status
desc: 测试 /api/status 接口契约验证

name: test_api_invalid_endpoint
desc: 测试未知 API 接口契约返回

name: test_validate_category_success
desc: 验证有效类别不会抛出异常

name: test_validate_category_failure
desc: 验证无效类别会抛出 ValueError

name: test_validate_category_edge_cases
desc: 验证边缘情况（空字符串、空格、大小写等）

name: test_concurrent_writes
desc: 模拟蜂群并发写入 (Simulate swarm concurrent writes to Ring Buffer)

name: _compute_pagerank_chunk
desc: Top-level function for PageRank computation to avoid ProcessPoolExecutor pickling issues.
